# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-grpc-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 50051
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8082
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8083
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 8084
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 8085
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: analytics-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: analytics-service
  port: 8086
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow ingress controller to reach API Gateway
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-ingress-to-api-gateway
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-nginx
          namespace: ingress-nginx

---
# ServerAuthorization: Only allow Prometheus to scrape admin ports
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-prometheus-to-admin
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring

---
# ServerAuthorization: API Gateway -> User Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-user-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: API Gateway -> User Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-user-service-grpc
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-grpc-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Order Service -> User Service gRPC (to validate user info)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-order-service-to-user-service-grpc
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-grpc-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: API Gateway -> Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-order-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Order Service -> Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-payment-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Order Service -> Inventory Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-inventory-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: API Gateway -> Inventory Service (for stock queries)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-inventory-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Order Service -> Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-notification-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Payment Service -> Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-payment-to-notification-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: User Service -> Notification Service (password resets, etc)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-user-to-notification-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Multiple services -> Analytics Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-services-to-analytics
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: analytics-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: production
        - name: user-service
          namespace: production
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow Linkerd Viz tap to reach all servers
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-linkerd-viz-tap
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    selector:
      matchExpressions:
        - key: app
          operator: Exists
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: tap
          namespace: linkerd-viz

---
# ServerAuthorization: Allow health checks from kubelet (unauthenticated)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-kubelet-probes-api-gateway
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-kubelet-probes-user-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-kubelet-probes-order-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-kubelet-probes-payment-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-kubelet-probes-inventory-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-kubelet-probes-notification-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-kubelet-probes-analytics-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: analytics-service-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8

---
# ServiceAccounts for each microservice
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: production

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: production

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: production

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: production

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: inventory-service
  namespace: production

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: production

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: analytics-service
  namespace: production
